item.title: About
item.description: Hi there! If you don’t know me, my name is Solomon Williams aka kansowi and I go by the twitter/instagram handle @kansowi. I’m 18 years old and pursuing a bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Information Technology at Reva University. I’m interested in Machine Learning, Security Research, Penetration Testing and CTFs. This website is supposed to be a portfolio for all my work and will be updated as I progress in my career.
